message.content:
Explore the Grid component and SearchDropdown component in this Raycast clone project. I need to understand:

1. How Grid component works (src/components/grid/) - its props, how it renders, how it handles keyboard nav
2. How SearchDropdown works (src/components/search_bar/search_dropdown.tsx) - its full implementation
3. How SearchBar integrates the dropdown prop
4. How ColorPickerView in App.tsx uses Grid
5. The mock color data structure (MOCK_COLORS from src/data/mock_data.ts)

Provide the full source of: grid.tsx, grid.scss, search_dropdown.tsx, search_dropdown.scss. Also show relevant types from types.ts for ColorItemData.

content.text: I'll systematically explore the Grid and SearchDropdown components, along with the supporting files. Let me start by mapping the project structure and then reading the relevant files.
Let me refine my search to focus on the src directory:
